properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Our God will reign forever And all the world will know His name Everyone together Sing the song of the redeemed

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I know that my redeemer lives And now I stand on what He did My Savior, my Savior lives Everyday a brand new chance to say Jesus, You are the only way My Savior, my Savior lives

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The King is come from Heaven And darkness trembles at His name Victory forever Is the song of the redeemed.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My Savior lives, my Savior lives, my Savior lives, My Savior lives, my Savior lives, my Savior lives, My Savior lives, my Savior lives, my Savior lives, My Savior lives, my Savior lives, my Savior lives.
